programme.title: Private Islands
programme.desc: Two Four Seasons luxury island resorts in the Maldives.

programme.title: Behind the Gates
programme.desc: Tours the most opulent island homes in the Caribbean.

programme.title: A Taste of Travel
programme.desc: Scotty channels his inner child while in Japan; Carolyne indulges in some of the delicacies Lyon, France has to offer; Lynton visits some monuments in Delhi, India; Scotty explores the food and history that Vietnam's Ho Chi Minh City has to offer.

programme.title: 5 Star Getaways
programme.desc: This series is a sun-filled invitation to travel and visit magnificent all-inclusive 5-star resorts throughout the world, their magnificent surroundings and the exciting excursions one can do at each destination.

programme.title: Facing Waves
programme.desc: Experience the magic of icebergs by sea kayak than the northern tip of Quirpon Island, the northernmost point of Newfoundland and Labrador.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Most Amazing Homes
programme.desc: Behind the gates of three mansions in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Road Less Traveled
programme.desc: Jonathan explores the activities of the West Coast by speeding around a racetrack, roller skating with femme fatales, and soaring high above the mountains.

programme.title: Dream Cruises
programme.desc: A tour of Myanmar on a river cruiser built specifically for the waters of the region; ancient temples and landscapes on the Irrawaddy River.

programme.title: Lux Lifestyles
programme.desc: A look at the culture and high-end attractions of Istanbul, Turkey.

programme.title: Top Travel
programme.desc: Deep inside the Amazon jungle.

programme.title: Travel in Style
programme.desc: Milan, Italy is blessed with beauty and style, full of statutes and sculptors; Burgundy, France is the perfect place if you're looking to unwind.

programme.title: Blue World
programme.desc: After going to the Bahamas to explore caves, Jonathan Bird travels around the world to learn about sea sponges.

programme.title: Private Islands
programme.desc: Top 10 private islands, each one magnificent and stunning in its own way.

programme.title: Behind the Gates
programme.desc: Exclusive mega-mansions.

programme.title: A Taste of Travel
programme.desc: Explorers journey to idyllic places to try local cuisine, find out what destinations have to offer and share travel trips along the way.

programme.title: Dream Cruises
programme.desc: Custom-built to navigate the Adriatic Sea and the Dalmatian Coast, the Belle de L'Adriatique sails along the Croatian coast; ports-of-call are Dubrovnik, Split, Hvar and Korcula.

programme.title: Selling Mega Mansions
programme.desc: Miami based Jefferson is a successful club owner, his wife, Ava, are in Aspen looking for a getaway home that might also serve as a place to start a family.

programme.title: Summer Fun Destinations
programme.desc: Summer-like images come to mind when talking about Southern California, so it's time to visit wine country to see why this should be the next stop for fun destinations.

programme.title: Most Amazing Homes
programme.desc: Three homes throughout Los Angeles.

programme.title: Private Islands
programme.desc: Top 10 private islands, each one magnificent and stunning in its own way.

programme.title: Distant Shores
programme.desc: Grenada.

programme.title: Lux Lifestyles
programme.desc: A look at the culture and high-end attractions of Istanbul, Turkey.

programme.title: Facing Waves
programme.desc: Compete in USVI's Paddle the Park SUP race, snorkel fish-fille waters, and find out why SUP yoga has become so popular.

programme.title: Top Travel
programme.desc: Deep inside the Amazon jungle.

programme.title: Find Me a Vacation Home
programme.desc: Property hunters look for luxurious vacation homes where paradise is in the backyard.

programme.title: Selling Jets
programme.desc: Pilot Dave asks Tim Pollard for help in finding the right jet to spend more time with his only daughter who lives in Atlanta; Peter and Alexis grow tired of charters and decide it's time to buy.

programme.title: Travel in Style
programme.desc: Milan, Italy is blessed with beauty and style, full of statutes and sculptors; Burgundy, France is the perfect place if you're looking to unwind.

programme.title: Road Less Traveled
programme.desc: Jonathan embarks on an extended tour through the Philippines. He explores the Colonial legacy in Spanish Intramuros and a mean streets boxing gym.

programme.desc: Miami based Jefferson is a successful club owner, his wife, Ava, are in Aspen looking for a getaway home that might also serve as a place to start a family.

programme.title: Boys Toys
programme.desc: P1 AquaX, a jet ski competition, in Fort Lauderdale, Fla.; a hunt for alligators in one of the latest air boats; an electric unicycle called the Uno Bolt.

programme.desc: Jonathan embarks on an extended tour through the Philippines. He explores the Colonial legacy in Spanish Intramuros and a mean streets boxing gym.

programme.title: Top Travel
programme.desc: Deep inside the Amazon jungle.

programme.title: Travel in Style
programme.desc: Luxury resorts and experiences in Bangkok.

programme.title: Blue World
programme.sub-title: Costa Rica, S. California, & St. Lawrence River
programme.desc: Whitetip reef sharks form gangs to hunt fish on Cocos Island, off the coast of Costa Rica; kelp forests on Catalina Island off the coast of Southern California; shipwrecks in the St. Lawrence River.

programme.title: Private Islands
programme.desc: The nightlife and beach culture of Phuket, Thailand.

programme.title: Behind the Gates
programme.desc: Anjie Balla tours four palatial properties, from a $36 million dollar home in the Hollywood Hills to an oceanfront Tuscan estate with a private beach.

programme.title: A Taste of Travel
programme.desc: Featuring the delights of Sorrento in Italy to the delicacies of South Africa.

programme.title: Dream Cruises
programme.desc: Launched in 2004 and completely renovated in 2010, the small but intimate MS Botticelli sails on France's revered Seine River with stops in Paris, Rouen, Caudebec-en-Caux and Honfleur.

programme.title: Selling Mega Mansions
programme.desc: Tatiana and Chas are in the market for a Charlotte, North Carolina estate; Tatiana and her husband travel the world organizing tasting events; they will need a residence while visiting their children, who attend a nearby boarding school.

programme.title: Most Amazing Homes
programme.desc: From Sunset Blvd to Pacific Coast Highway, these homes have it all.

programme.title: Private Islands
programme.desc: The nightlife and beach culture of Phuket, Thailand.

programme.title: Distant Shores
programme.desc: Union Island; Marine Park.

programme.title: Lux Lifestyles
programme.desc: A visit to Istanbul, Turkey.

programme.title: Facing Waves
programme.sub-title: Sea Kayak the San Juan Islands
programme.desc: Paddling the San Juan Islands of Washington State; learn what goes into the making of a sea kayak with local manufacturer, Eddyline Kayak; experience the Island's pristine coastlines that are littered with humpback and killer whales.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Top Travel
programme.desc: Deep inside the Amazon jungle.

programme.title: Find Me a Vacation Home
programme.desc: Property hunters look for luxurious vacation homes where paradise is in the backyard.

programme.title: Selling Jets
programme.desc: As Dave and Brenda hit turbulence, Tim Pollard suggests a compromise that may save their relationship and close the deal; in Peter and Alexis's quest for a large cabin aircraft, Cameron Jones impresses with a Challenger 601.

programme.title: Travel in Style
programme.desc: Luxury resorts and experiences in Bangkok.

programme.title: Road Less Traveled
programme.desc: Host Jonathan Legg seeks divine protection on a visit to the Black Nazarene of Quiapo church in Manila; an interview with an exorcist kick-starts a forbidding voyage through the paranormal filled with Filipino vampires and demonic possessions.

programme.title: Selling Mega Mansions
programme.desc: Tatiana and Chas are in the market for a Charlotte, North Carolina estate; Tatiana and her husband travel the world organizing tasting events; they will need a residence while visiting their children, who attend a nearby boarding school.

programme.desc: From Sunset Blvd to Pacific Coast Highway, these homes have it all.

programme.title: Distant Shores
programme.desc: Union Island; Marine Park.

programme.title: Boys Toys
programme.desc: A new wake boat, the Malibu M235; the Ripchair 3.0; a sustainable spin on the traditional man cave or office.
